name: Impossible Ham & Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Smoked ham, fully cooked, cubed
1 package Asparagus, frozen, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Grease a pie plate.
3. Sprinkle the ham, half of the cheese, asparagus, and onions evenly over the bottom of the greased pie plate.
4. In a blender or food processor, beat together the milk, eggs, Bisquick, salt, and pepper until smooth (about 15 seconds at high speed).
5. Pour the mixture over the ingredients in the pie plate.
6. Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Sprinkle the remaining cheese on top of the casserole.
8. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
9. Serves 6-8.
